meta.description: Dashboard domain taxonomy for dashboard generation decision trees

goals: training_completion_tracking
learner_performance_insights
plan_rollout_and_assignment_management
team_compliance_monitoring
use_cases: training_plan_rollout_tracking
manager_1:1 learner preparation
team training compliance review
development plan completion reporting

goals: enterprise_learning_measurement
training_cost_and_vendor_analytics
program_capacity_and_utilization
organization_level_training_reporting
use_cases: L&D director executive review of spend and hours
vendor spend and top-vendor reporting
instructor-led training (ILT) performance measurement
organization and job-level learning volume analysis

goals: platform_adoption_tracking
active_user_and_login_monitoring
engagement_trend_analysis
audit_of_recent_activity
use_cases: LMS adoption health check
monitoring weekly/monthly active users
identifying low-adoption teams/roles
recent login and activity audit for investigations

goals: system_level_training_management
certification_and_compliance_tracking
integration_of_LMS_with_HR_systems
course_and_employee_catalog_management
use_cases: cornerstone/workday course administration
certification expiration and recertification tracking
cross-system training reconciliation
operational LMS housekeeping and QA

goals: workforce_headcount_and_position_tracking
employee_lifecycle_reporting
HR-driven compliance and training linkages
operational HR analytics
use_cases: Workday operational dashboards for HR ops
headcount and position vacancy tracking
termination-to-access workflows
workforce analytics for planning

goals: real_time_alert_and_incident_triage
security_posture_monitoring
investigation_and_remediation_coordination
vulnerability_tracking_and_sla_management
use_cases: active incident response and triage
SOC operations alert handling
post-incident forensic timeline review
prioritizing CVEs and remediation workflows

goals: control_posture_visibility
audit_and_evidence_preparation
tracking_remediation_and_control_gaps
executive compliance summarization
use_cases: SOC2 continuous monitoring dashboards
audit-ready posture overviews for reviewers
control gap identification and assignment
board-level compliance summaries for executives

goals: unified_g_r_c_surface_across_systems
mapping_controls_across_hr_lms_and_security
end-to-end_compliance_workflows
cross-domain_audit_and_risk_prioritization
use_cases: HIPAA or SOC2 programs that span HR and Security
access_recirtification linked to training completion
GRC dashboards combining Cornerstone/Workday/Security signals
cross-domain risk scoring and reporting

goals: access_review_and_recertification
orphaned_account_and_privilege_detection
linking_terminations_to_access_revocation
access_risk_reduction
use_cases: running access certification campaigns
detecting and remediating privilege creep
orphaned account cleanup
evidence collection for access-related controls

goals: migration_progress_tracking
data_quality_and_mapping_validation
ETL_and_integration_health_monitoring
migration_risk_and_issue_tracking
use_cases: tracking progress of LMS system migrations
QA of data mappings and transformation results
ETL job monitoring during migration
reporting migration blockers to stakeholders

goals: high_level_program_summaries
board_ready_compliance_and_risk_overviews
trend_based_performance_highlights
decision_support_for_executives
use_cases: board and C-level briefings
executive health checks for L&D or Security
quarterly compliance summaries
executive approval flows for remediation spend

goals: monitor training plan rollout progress against targets (per cohort/plan)
surface per-learner and per-assignment completion status and reasons for delay
enable managers to prepare for 1:1s with learner-specific training insights
report on training plan effectiveness (completion rates, time-to-complete, pass rates)
identify at-risk learners and trigger remediation or re-assignment workflows
focus_areas: plan-level KPIs and progress by cohort/org
operational detail tables for audit and evidence
use_cases: Training administrator tracking a specific training plan rollout and exporting assignment evidence for auditors
Team manager preparing for a performance 1:1 with a learner’s completion, hours, and missed deadlines
L&D coordinator identifying groups with high overdue rates to schedule make-up sessions
People leader reviewing re-certification schedules and sending targeted reminders
improvements: Made goals action-oriented and measurable (e.g., triggers, targets)
Expanded focus areas to include remediation and audit evidence
Specified concrete use-case scenarios and who performs them
Refined audience personas to common operational roles

goals: measure enterprise learning program performance (utilization, completion, ROI proxies)
analyze training cost, vendor spend, and per-learner cost trends
optimize program capacity and resource utilization (instructors, ILT capacity)
identify top/under-performing courses and reallocate investment
provide consolidated org-level reporting for finance and L&D leadership
focus_areas: cost & spend breakdown by vendor, program, org
program capacity, attendance and utilization rates (ILT/virtual)
trend and cohort-based ROI metrics (cost-per-completion, hours-per-learner)
use_cases: L&D Director reviewing monthly spend vs budget and deciding vendor renewals
Learning operations manager optimizing ILT capacity and instructor scheduling
Finance analyst reconciling training spend and calculating cost-per-learner
Vendor manager identifying top vendors by hours and negotiating rates
improvements: Broke down ROI and utilization goals explicitly
Added vendor and finance personas
Expanded focus areas to include trend- and cohort-based measurement

goals: track platform adoption and active engagement metrics (DAU/WAU/MAU, unique users)
identify adoption gaps by job role, team, and location
analyze temporal engagement patterns and seasonality
support investigations with recent activity audit trails
focus_areas: login and activity volume (unique users, sessions, frequency)
adoption by job role and organizational unit
time series trends (daily/weekly/monthly) and YOY comparisons
recent activity / audit trail for security or HR investigations
use_cases: Product adoption analyst monitoring weekly/monthly active user trends and spikes
LMS admin identifying low-adoption teams for targeted enablement
Learning operations running a campaign to increase logins and measuring lift
Security/HR investigator reviewing recent login activity for suspected misuse
improvements: Clarified engagement KPIs (DAU/WAU/MAU equivalents)
Expanded investigation and audit trail use cases
More precise audience roles for analytics vs operations

goals: manage course catalogs, enrollments and assignments across LMS systems
monitor certification status, expirations, and re-certification pipelines
ensure integration health with HR systems (Workday, Cornerstone) and reconcile records
perform operational housekeeping, QA and data reconciliation for LMS
focus_areas: course, enrollment and certification lists and detail reconciliations
integration health, sync errors and mapping issues (HR ↔ LMS)
expiration and recertification schedules and automated reminders
system-level operations (course creation, enrollments, audit exports, QA logs)
use_cases: LMS admin reconciling course enrollments against HR records after an integration sync
Compliance officer reviewing upcoming certificate expirations and assigning re-cert cycles
HR IT integration engineer debugging mapping issues between Workday and Cornerstone
Training operations performing monthly QA and cleaning up stale course records
improvements: Emphasized integration health and reconciliation tasks
Added operational QA and export use cases
Refined certification lifecycle goals and audience

goals: provide authoritative headcount and position data for operational planning
track employee lifecycle events (onboarding, transfers, terminations) and downstream impacts
surface HR-driven compliance signals tied to training and access
support operational HR analytics for capacity planning and vacancy management
focus_areas: Workday HCM metrics: headcount, FTE, vacancies and position structure
org and position hierarchy visualizations for downstream assignment
links between HR events and training / security controls
use_cases: HR ops manager tracking open positions and time-to-fill by department
People analytics producing turnover and tenure reports for leadership
HR systems admin validating new hire records sync to LMS and access systems
Talent acquisition lead analyzing funnel conversion and hiring forecasts
improvements: Made lifecycle impacts explicit (training/access linkages)
Added specific HR system personas and operational use cases
Clarified headcount/position metrics as authoritative planning inputs

goals: provide real-time alert triage and incident prioritization workflows
monitor security posture and key incident metrics (MTTR, MTTD, mean time to contain)
support detailed investigation timelines and evidence collection
track vulnerability remediation progress, SLAs and blast-radius impact
focus_areas: alert queues and triage lists with drill-down to investigation context
incident timelines, evidence, root cause and remediation status
vulnerability and CVE correlation to assets and exposure scoring
operational SLAs and responder workload / capacity dashboards
use_cases: SOC analyst triaging incoming alerts and escalating incidents with severity context
Incident response lead reviewing investigation timelines and assigning post-incident actions
Vulnerability manager prioritizing CVEs by blast radius and tracking remediations to SLA
SOC manager monitoring queue backlog, analyst utilization and MTTR trends
improvements: Added operational KPIs (MTTR/MTTD) and SLA tracking to goals
Explicitly listed vulnerability correlation focus area
Refined audience tiers to L1/L2 analysts and SOC leadership

goals: provide a single pane of glass for control posture across frameworks (SOC2, HIPAA, ISO)
prepare audit evidence and exportable artifacts for reviewers
track remediation pipelines, owners, and time-to-remediate
deliver executive-level compliance summaries and risk heatmaps
focus_areas: control-level status, evidence links and test results
audit readiness dashboards organized by framework and control set
remediation tracking with owners, due dates and SLAs
cross-functional control dependencies and risk scoring
use_cases: GRC manager preparing a SOC2 evidence package and tracking control tests
Internal auditor drilling into control evidence and test history
Compliance lead monitoring remediation backlogs and prioritizing actions
Executive stakeholder viewing board-ready compliance summaries and risk exposures
improvements: Stated audit evidence and export as explicit goals
Added control owner persona and remediation SLA focus
Clarified mapping to multiple frameworks and executive needs

goals: unify GRC signals that span HR, LMS and security systems for end-to-end control visibility
map controls and evidence across systems (training ↔ access ↔ policy)
orchestrate cross-system remediation workflows and re-certifications
prioritize cross-domain risks with consolidated scoring and audit narratives
focus_areas: HR-training-security control mapping and evidence correlation
access-certification linked to training completion and HR events
cross-system remediation tracking and status reconciliation
use_cases: GRC director assessing SOC2 controls that require HR and training evidence
Compliance program manager linking access recertification results to training completion before re-approval
Internal audit performing cross-system control tests combining Cornerstone, Workday and IAM signals
Security and HR stakeholders coordinating remediation workflows for policy violations
improvements: Clarified orchestration and cross-system evidence correlation goals
Made use cases explicitly cross-functional with concrete actions
Reinforced remediation and re-certification workflows

goals: execute and monitor access review and re-certification campaigns to completion
detect privilege creep and anomalous entitlement growth
identify and remediate orphaned, inactive or excessive privileged accounts
ensure HR termination events trigger timely access revocation
focus_areas: access review campaign status, approver workload, and evidence
role & privilege analysis (privilege creep, segregation-of-duty conflicts)
termination-to-access revocation workflows and audit trails
use_cases: IAM manager running quarterly access certification campaigns and collecting approver evidence
Security engineer detecting privilege creep by comparing role assignments over time
Compliance officer compiling access evidence for audits
HR ops coordinating with IAM on terminations to validate access removal
improvements: Added approver workload and campaign evidence as goals
Included SoD/conflict detection in focus areas
Clarified termination workflows as an important use case

goals: track migration progress against milestones and cutover readiness
validate data mappings and surface quality issues and discrepancies
monitor ETL/integration job health and error rates in near real-time
identify blockers and manage migration risk to stakeholders
focus_areas: system-to-system mapping validation and transformation checks
migration KPIs: percent complete, records migrated, error counts
data validation dashboards (row counts, checksum diffs, sample mismatches)
ETL job monitoring, retries, and cutover readiness checklists
use_cases: Data migration manager monitoring daily migration velocity and escalating blockers
ETL engineer diagnosing mapping mismatches and failed jobs
LMS product owner validating migrated course/enrollment counts post-cutover
Project manager reporting cutover readiness and risk to sponsors
improvements: Made data validation and ETL health explicit goals
Added concrete migration KPIs and stakeholders
Included cutover readiness and QA as focus areas

goals: deliver concise, board-ready summaries of program health and risk
highlight top trends and KPIs for decision support (cost, compliance, MTTR, adoption)
surface key risks and remediation status with clear ownership and ask
enable quick drill-to-detail links for follow-up by operational owners
focus_areas: topline KPI strips and one-pane summaries (health, cost, compliance)
risk summaries and executive-level remediation status
use_cases: C-level executive reviewing health of L&D and security programs ahead of a board meeting
VP of L&D preparing a concise deck of program KPIs for executive leadership
Chief compliance officer sharing audit readiness and residual risk with the board
Board member viewing concise risk and remediation summaries with links to owners
improvements: Clarified decision-support nature of dashboards and need for drill-to-detail
Specified export/presentation needs for board reporting
Aligned KPIs and risks with executive audiences

goals: provide a unified operational console for triage, investigation and action (master list → detail → adviser)
surface posture strips and high-priority signals for rapid situational awareness
enable collaborative investigations with integrated chat / analyst workflows
support causal analysis with graphs and evidence linking across systems
focus_areas: posture / health strip (top KPIs and status across systems)
master incident/alert list with rich filtering and ranking
detailed investigation pane with signals, timelines and causal graphs
integrated analyst collaboration (chat, notes, actions) and escalation
use_cases: SOC or Ops command center running the day shift monitoring alerts and escalations
Incident commander coordinating a cross-functional response using causal graphs and chat
Compliance or controls ops monitoring continuous monitoring alerts and control deviations
Operations manager triaging high-priority incidents and assigning owners
ops_command_center.rationale: Templates like 'command-center' and 'triage-focused' do not map cleanly to existing L&D or compliance domains. A dedicated 'Command Center' domain groups three-panel/chat/graph dashboards intended for live operations, triage, and cross-functional incident command.

key_improvements: Rewrote goals to be specific, measurable and action-oriented across domains
Expanded and clarified focus areas to include operational needs (evidence, SLAs, integration health)
Converted generic audiences into explicit personas and role levels
Added a new 'Command & Incident Command Center' domain to cover operational templates
Validated and adjusted complexity and theme recommendations (dark for SOC/ops, light for executive/L&D)
